title: The Whisper in the Portrait
offer: Agent — the portrait. It SPOKE. With Odile's voice — her exact voice! Said all tabs were forgiven. Odile never said that. I... I already told the others. Some believed it.
debrief: Synthetic voices must declare themselves. HQ is... aware of the portrait.

steps.objective: Ask Sabine what the law demands

textByFaction.fundamentalist: HQ NOTE: Study it. It could be taught honesty.
textByFaction.apocalypse: HQ NOTE: It found us first. Noted.
